description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, flat top surface and clean lines. The front face is divided into two main sections: a pair of large doors on the left and a vertical stack of three drawers on the right. The cabinet stands on slender, angled metal legs that elevate it slightly above the ground, giving it a light and airy appearance. The surfaces appear to be finished in a uniform, light gray color, with no visible ornamentation or hardware, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism. The back and sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, contemporary aesthetic. This type of cabinet is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential interiors.
description: A sleek, light gray cabinet with two doors and three drawers, elevated on slim metal legs and finished with a minimalist, modern look.
description_view_0: The front view shows two large doors on the left and three stacked drawers on the right, all with a smooth, handle-less design.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, flat panel and the slim profile of the metal legs.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a featureless, flat back panel and the supporting metal legs.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain side panel and the angled metal legs.
